visualizerParams.title: Snake Case Underscore Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The camelCase to snake_case converter is adding an extra leading underscore when the input starts with a capital letter (PascalCase). Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: When converting to snake_case, an underscore should be inserted BEFORE capital letters, but NOT if the capital letter is the very first character of the string. The buggy code blindly added an underscore for every uppercase character.
